betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Dineutronium§f

§aThe ultimate material of NTM — pure neutron-degenerate matter produced by the particle accelerator!§f

§bDineutronium§f (abbreviated §bDNT§f) is the mod's ultimate tier material, higher than even euphemium. It is very difficult to produce but essential for the most absurd and broken items in the mod. Dineutronium cannot be stamped — compound plates must be made in an anvil.

§6Production§f:
You need a §bParticle Accelerator§f with a power level of at least §e12,500§f and an §bExposure Chamber§f.

Recipe: §e8×§b Ferric Schrabidate Ingots§f + §e1×§b Sparkticle Capsule§f
→ §bDineutronium Ingot§f (consumes both inputs)

The Sparkticle Capsule requires: Pulverized Enchantment + Strange Quark Capsule @ §e12,500 momentum§f

The Ferric Schrabidate requires a fusion reactor and chemical processing.

§6Properties§f:
§b• Density comparable to neutron-degenerate matter
§b• Nearly indestructible in compound plate form
§b• Used for the most powerful armor, tools, and reactor components

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bDNT Nano Suit§f — the ultimate power armor (requires §e24§f DNT compound plates for full set)
§b• §bElectronium§f — combine with Book of Boxcars + ionized particles
§b• §bDineutronium Compound Plate§f — made in an anvil (can't use press)
§b• §bDineutronium Anvil§f — shares recipes with Osmiridium Anvil

§cWarning§f: Each dineutronium ingot costs massive infrastructure. Plan your production carefully — a single mistake in the PA setup can waste rare sparkticle capsules!

§eTip§f: Automate sparkticle production before scaling up dineutronium. Each sparkticle requires a strange quark, dark matter, antischrabidium, and antimatter. Set up a dedicated PA loop for each intermediate particle.
